findings.location: s1 — バージョン番号の準備 note block
findings.description: The source explicitly documents formal method signatures for `prepareVersion` and `prepareVersions` via RST `.. function::` directives, including return type and full parameter types: `boolean prepareVersion(ExecutionContext context, ExclusiveControlContext exclusiveControlContext)` and `boolean prepareVersions(ExecutionContext context, List<? extends ExclusiveControlContext> exclusiveControlContexts)`. The knowledge file notes the boolean return value but omits the complete parameter type signatures.
findings.source_evidence:
.. function:: boolean prepareVersion(ExecutionContext context, ExclusiveControlContext exclusiveControlContext)
.. function:: boolean prepareVersions(ExecutionContext context, List<? extends ExclusiveControlContext> exclusiveControlContexts)
